name: Coriander Spareribs
recipeIngredient: 1 Teaspoon Dried Red Hot Chilies, crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat off ribs.
2. Cut ribs apart between bones.
3. In a 14- by 17-inch pan, mix together sugar, garlic, lemon juice, coriander, chilies, salt, and water to make a paste.
4. Add ribs, stirring gently to coat with seasoning paste.
5. Cover and chill at least 4 hours or up to overnight.
6. Bake, covered, in a 400 degree oven until meat is almost tender when pierced, about 1 hour.
7. Uncover and continue baking, stirring occasionally, until well browned, about 30 minutes.
8. Lift out of pan and serve hot.
